Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Updatable.LightBulletin.LightBulletinInputImageDataV1

Represents information about temporary stored image for light bulletin.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
PreviewFile

The file information, that contains preview for attached image.

None.
OriginalFile

The file information, that contains attached image.
